title: AxoProtectionBlock
description: AxoProtectionBlock is a modern protection plugin for Paper servers that allows players to create protected regions using special blocks, without depending on WorldGuard or other external systems.
body:
![axoprotectionblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b1ad1731c18eed7041a6230f4f757a35773ba41.png)


# AxoProtectionBlock

AxoProtectionBlock is a modern and highly optimized protection plugin for Paper and Folia servers that allows players to create protected regions simply by placing configurable protection blocks.

Unlike traditional protection plugins, AxoProtectionBlock includes its own independent region engine without depending on WorldGuard for normal protection handling.

The plugin includes advanced region management, visual menus, configurable flags, multilingual support, rent and tax systems, custom recipes, SQL storage, migrations, and optional integrations.

---


![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3931abc01b71752eed3d8a44a4362d028698c857_0.webp)
# ✨ Features

## 🛡️ Advanced Protection System

* Create protected regions by placing configurable protection blocks
* Independent region engine optimized by worlds and chunks
* No WorldGuard dependency required for normal protection handling
* Region overlap prevention
* Dynamic permission-based limits compatible with LuckPerms
* Region border visualization
* Cleanup tools for inactive protections

---

## 🧱 Fully Configurable Protection Blocks

Configure each protection block individually:

* Materials
* Display names
* Lore
* Custom heads
* CustomModelData
* Recipes
* Permissions
* Region sizes
* Limits
* Flags
* Enter/leave messages
* Prices
* Rent settings
* Tax settings

---

## 👥 Member & Ownership System

* Member system
* Co-owner system
* Ban/unban players
* Kick players from protections
* Shared access management
* Administrative bypass tools

---

## 🚩 Configurable Flags

Includes configurable flags such as:

* PvP
* Mob damage
* Entity damage
* Explosions
* Containers
* Interactions
* Liquids
* Pistons
* Fire
* Entry
* Block breaking
* Block placing
* And more

---

## 🖥️ Visual GUI Menus

Modern configurable menus for:

* Protections
* Members
* Homes
* Recipes
* Shops
* Rent system
* Tax system
* Administrative tools

---

## 🔨 Crafting & Shop System

* Custom crafting recipes for protection blocks
* `/apb recipes <block>` menu to preview crafting recipes
* Integrated protection shop
* Optional Vault economy support

---

## 🏠 Homes & Teleportation

* Homes inside protections
* Safe teleportation system
* Teleportation inside protected regions
* Configurable teleport settings

---

## 🏷️ Rent & Tax Systems

Optional systems for advanced servers:

* Protection rent system
* Tax system
* Automatic renewals
* Debt handling
* Automatic expiration
* Configurable actions and punishments

---

## 🌍 Multi-Language Support

Included languages:

* English
* Spanish
* Russian

Features:

* Automatic client language detection
* Configurable fallback language
* Easy language file customization

---

## 🗃️ Storage & Database Support

* YAML storage
* SQLite support
* Per-protection storage system
* Optimized data loading

---

## 🔁 Migration Tools

Migration support from:

* YAML
* ProtectionStones
* RoyaleProtectionBlocks

---

## 🧩 Optional Integrations

Compatible with:

* PlaceholderAPI
* Vault
* CraftEngine
* WorldGuard
* Discord webhooks

---

# 📦 Requirements

* ☕ Java 25+
* 📄 Paper/folia 1.21.11 / API 26.1.2+
* 🔐 Permissions plugin recommended (LuckPerms recommended)


![SHOWCASE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84182f7290c79d8d188abe865fe3cf643aeb0d67.png)
